faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in East Flatbush?
faqs.answer: East Flatbush homes typically deal with pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Pavement ants are especially common in this neighborhood due to the numerous older homes with foundation cracks. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method for complete elimination.
